caption:
ad There’s a new pop-up coming to London for 1 day only and you need to save the date: next Wednesday, 18th March. @dove.uki is launching its new refillable deodorant and at the Dove Drop Shop pop-up you’ll get:
✨ Exclusive discounts on your starter kit (1/3 off your case and refills!)
✍️ Free case engraving 
🥂 Free drink on arrival
🎶 DJ
📸 Free photo booth

You’ll be able to discover the whole range here so make sure you head down, share this and save it for all the details 👇
📍The Stables, 40 Earlham Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9LH
🗓️ Wednesday 18 March 2026
🎟️ Price: Free entry (walk-in), no ticket required
⏰ 12pm-8pm

#dovedropshop #londonpopup #thingstodoinlondon

transcription.text: Okay so there's a free one day only pop-up coming to London that you do not want to miss. Dove is launching its first ever refillable deodorant in partnership with Boots and they're bringing an incredible pop-up to Comet Garden on the 18th of March. This is the Dove refillable bar. Here you'll get exclusive discounts on your starter kit, get your case engraved for free, get a complimentary drink on arrival and you can discover the whole collection. There will even be a DJ and a free photo booth. The new deodorant comes in a sleek refillable case with interchangeable scents and offers up to 72 hours of protection with over 50% skincare ingredients which is so exciting. So make sure you head down and take a screenshot of this, send it to the group chat, you don't want to miss it.
